EmailTemplate.description: Email to use when a lead has previously told us they had ensured elsewhere.
EmailTemplate.name: Insured Elsewhere_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Want a competitive business insurance quote?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Thank you for getting a quote with us last year.
As your insurance may be due for renewal shortly, I wanted to re-quote you this year to see if I can save you money compared to your current provider.
It only takes 5-10 minutes to provide you with a comprehensive no-obligation quote. Not ready for a quote yet? Book a call with me closer to your renewal date - https://calendly.com/d/cm3g-k74-js2/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back
Alternatively, let me know your renewal date so I can contact you nearer the time.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
